videoSnippet.title: The Challenger! || Vaishali vs Kateryna Lagno || FIDE Women's Candidates Tournament 2026 R14
videoSnippet.description:

Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Bluebaum, Matthias (2698) - Giri, Anish (2753)
FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [14] 2026.04.15
D38 Queen's Gambit Declined, Ragozin variation

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 d6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 Nf6 5.Nc3 g6 6.Be3 Bg7 7.f3 O-O 8.Qd2 Nc6 9.O-O-O d5 10.Nxc6 bxc6 11.Bc4 Be6 12.exd5 cxd5 13.Nxd5 Nxd5 14.Bxd5 Rb8 15.Bb3 Qc8 16.Kb1 Bxb3 17.axb3 a5 18.Bd4 e5 19.Bc3 a4 20.bxa4 Qc4 21.b3 Qxa4 22.Rhe1 Rb5 23.Re4 Qa7 24.Qe3 Qc7 25.Qd3 Qb6 26.Bb2 Ra5 27.Bc3 Ra6 28.Qe3 Qc6 29.Rc4 Qe6 30.Qe4 Rfa8 31.Rc5 h5 32.g4 hxg4 33.fxg4 Kh7 34.Rcd5 Qc6 35.Bb2 Ra2 36.g5 Qb6 37.Qh4+ Kg8 38.Qe4 R8a4 39.Rd8+ Kh7 40.c4 Rxc4 41.Qxc4 Rxb2+ 42.Kxb2 e4+ 43.Kb1 Qf2 44.R8d2 Qf5 45.Qd5 Qf3 46.Rc2 Qf4 47.Re1 e3 48.Qg2
